full_text:
Zhao Fan 趙範
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Fan (趙範)was born in Zhending. Offered his sister-in-law to Zhao Yun who refused. Zhao Fan was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Shu Kingdom.
